mission.title: serverless-workflow: Rename output.from and output.to
mission.description: Rename output.from and output.to. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current serverless-workflow deployment
steps.description:
Verify your serverless-workflow version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow
helm list -n serverless-workflow 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working serverless-workflow installation.

steps.title: Review serverless-workflow configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant serverless-workflow configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow
kubectl get configmap -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=serverless-workflow
```
Output.from expression indicates the result of the task (and can be consumed by subsequent task) 
Output.to expression indicates what should be the value of the context once the task is completed.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Rename output.from and output.to
steps.description:
Fix https://github.com/serverlessworkflow/specification/issues/873
output.from is renamed as output.as
output.to is renamed as export.as
```yaml
output: 
    context: 
        set:
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n serverless-workflow -l app.kubernetes.io/name=serverless-workflow
kubectl get events -n serverless-workflow --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Rename output.from and output.to" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Fix https://github.com/serverlessworkflow/specification/issues/873
output.from is renamed as output.as
output.to is renamed as export.as
codeSnippets:
input:
  from: ...
  schema: ...
output:
  to/as: ...
  schema: ...
export:
  to/as: ...
  schema: ...

input:
  from: ...
  schema: ...
output:
  to/as: ...
  schema: ...
export: 'myexpression'

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with serverless-workflow installed or the issue environment reproducible.
